{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":334508,"duration_api_ms":322044,"num_turns":71,"result":"Step 4 complete. Here's what was implemented:

- **`supabase/migrations/0002_outbox.sql`** — outbox table with status check constraint and partial index on pending rows
- **`src/types/db.ts`** — added `outbox` table types + `Relationships`/`Views`/`Functions`/`CompositeTypes` fields required by supabase-js v2.103.3's strict generic constraints
- **`src/agent/commandRouter.ts`** — routes 5 intents (status, rules, reorder, approve, block) via Supabase reads/writes
- **`src/agent/worker.ts`** — initializes Spectrum, reclaims stuck `sending` rows on boot, drains outbox every 2s, handles inbound iMessages with soft phone-auth
- **`src/services/outbox.ts`** — `enqueueMessage()` helper for API routes to use instead of touching Spectrum directly
